attributes.description: Dashboard for managed_device logs from Microsoft Intune.

params.markdown:
**Microsoft Intune**

**Overview**

This dashboard provides a concise overview of managed device inventory data, offering visibility into device posture and distribution across the environment. It highlights the total number of managed devices and unencrypted device storage and presents breakdowns by operating system, compliance state, jailbroken, ownership type, SKU family, manufacturer, and model.

The dashboard also tracks device records over time to monitor enrollment and activity trends. Detailed tables provide comprehensive device inventory information, including OS version, device state, and last contact time, along with identity and hardware attributes such as device ID, serial number, manufacturer, model, and Wi-Fi MAC address.

An essential device details view supports quick operational and compliance checks by displaying key fields like device name, user email, OS, and compliance state.

[**Integrations Page**](/app/integrations/detail/microsoft_intune/overview)
